title: move mistral to small 3.2, add mistral-4, move llama-4-scout to openrouter
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
Both Mistral Small 3.1 and Llama 4 Scout were billed on Azure as Marketplace SaaS pass-through (`publisherType: Marketplace`, `isAzureCreditEligible: false`), so they cost real money regardless of credit-pool attachment. The public Retail Prices catalog confirms no first-party `Azure Mistral Models - Small` or `Azure Llama Models - Scout` SKU exists.

## Changes

| Model alias | Before | After | Effective rate (per 1M, in/out) | vs current |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `mistral` / `mistral-small-2503` | Azure Mistral Small 3.1 | OpenRouter `mistralai/mistral-small-3.2-24b-instruct` | $0.075 / $0.200 | **−37%** |
| `mistral-4` (NEW) | — | OpenRouter `mistralai/mistral-small-2603` | $0.150 / $0.600 | new |
| `llama-scout` / `Llama-4-Scout-17B-16E-Instruct` | Azure Llama 4 Scout | OpenRouter `meta-llama/llama-4-scout` | $0.080 / $0.300 | **−64%** |

The `mistral-small-2503` alias keeps the same public name but the backing model bumps from 3.1 → 3.2 (newer, cheaper, same 128k context). The registry already exposed `mistral-small-3.2` aliases pointing at this id.

Registry costs updated to match OpenRouter pricing; no separate `price` set so users pay cost (default behavior). `paidOnly` not set — free for all tiers, same as before.

`OPENROUTER_API_KEY` is already configured as a Cloudflare worker secret on prod.

## Estimated savings

May 1-15 spend baseline: €114 Mistral 3.1 + €40 Llama 4 Scout = €154/2-weeks on Azure (~€308/mo).
After: ~€80 Mistral 3.2 + €14 Llama 4 Scout = €94/2-weeks (~€188/mo). **~€120/mo saved** + Mistral 4 available as new option.

## Test plan
- `curl gen.pollinations.ai/v1/chat/completions` with `model: mistral-small-2503` → expect 200
- same with `model: mistral-4` → expect 200
- same with `model: Llama-4-Scout-17B-16E-Instruct` → expect 200

gist.headline: Mistral 4 joins the hive
gist.blurb: We've added the brand new Mistral 4 model to our text generation API, and bumped our default Mistral up to version 3.2. More models, more magic, still free!
gist.summary: Upgraded the default `mistral` alias from Small 3.1 to 3.2, added the new `mistral-4` (Small 2603) model, and migrated Llama 4 Scout to OpenRouter.
gist.impact: Users can now generate text with Mistral 4 and the upgraded Mistral 3.2, with all models remaining fully accessible on the free tier.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee upgrading server components. A wind/breeze motif for Mistral and a small llama reference for Llama 4 Scout. The robot companion helping out.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny engineer's hat, slotting a glowing lime green (#ecf874) cartridge labeled 'M4' into a retro server console. A chunky pixel robot with a monitor head stands nearby holding a tiny pixelated llama. Soft pastel lavender and mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
